name: [GRIDHAND] Win-Back Agent - No purchase/visit in 30 days → personalized win-back SMS

gridhand.scenario: No purchase/visit in 30 days → personalized win-back SMS
gridhand.description: When a customer hasn't made a purchase or visited a business, such as a barbershop, in 30 days, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered to send a personalized win-back SMS via the shop's existing SMS marketing app, offering a limited-time discount on their next haircut, which is tailored to the customer's previous services and preferences. This SMS is sent at 10am on the 31st day, allowing the customer to plan a visit at their convenience, and includes a direct link to book an appointment online. By re-engaging with inactive customers in a timely and personalized manner, the barbershop owner can increase the chances of winning back lost business and boosting revenue.
